hero.name: devcy0922
hero.headline: Extending enterprise backend experience into AI platforms.
hero.tagline: I design policy boundaries and safe execution paths for enterprise AI, grounded in authentication, authorization, audit, and DevOps experience.
hero.context: I connect lessons from legacy modernization, CI/CD, SSO, and AWS operations to AI Gateway and Agent Security, then verify them with public code and a Live Lab.
path.caption: From request entry to operational audit
path.boundary: Every stage revalidates identity and tenant scope. Operational secrets and internal model IDs never reach the public interface.
capability.boundary.title: Multi-tenant request boundary
capability.boundary.desc: Enforce identity, authorization, quotas, and data scope on every request.
capability.delivery.title: Verifiable delivery system
capability.delivery.desc: Control change risk with IaC, security regression tests, and automated delivery.
capability.runtime.title: Observable AI runtime
capability.runtime.desc: Connect routing, inference, and audit events into one operational flow.
career.title: Extending familiar operational problems into AI request boundaries.
career.desc: These are not isolated trend projects. I redesign recurring enterprise concerns—identity, delivery, audit, and integration—for generative AI systems.
career.identity.title: Identity and authorization
career.identity.desc: Extend enterprise SSO and authorization into project principals, model policies, and tool permissions.
career.delivery.title: Delivery and runtime standards
career.delivery.desc: Apply CI/CD, Docker, and AWS operations to reproducible AI delivery and security regression testing.
career.operations.title: Audit and legacy integration
career.operations.desc: Turn audit, key management, external API, and data integration experience into traceable request flows and isolation boundaries.
career.destination: Policy, isolation, and audit boundaries in GoVail AI Platform
section.selectedSystems.desc: GoVail is the representative system. Aegis-LLM, Aperture MCP, and SliceRAG are its verifiable core components, while AgentSecOps Playground validates the boundaries together.
system.platform.label: REPRESENTATIVE SYSTEM · PLATFORM
system.core.label: VERIFIABLE CORE COMPONENTS
system.validation.label: INTEGRATION VALIDATION
lab.intro.title: The execution path comes before the pitch.
lab.intro.desc: Use the Live Lab below to inspect runtime contracts and failure boundaries, then follow a real private LLM request from policy checks through response auditing.
lab.intro.evidence: View E2E security invariants and failover evidence
project.govail.title: GoVail Gateway
project.govail.desc: A Rust Gateway for authentication, policy, routing, and auditing in front of private LLMs.
project.aegis.title: Aegis-LLM
project.aegis.desc: A Rust Control Plane for LLM authentication, DLP, Prompt Security, and fallback.
project.slicerag.title: SliceRAG
project.slicerag.desc: A RAG Data Plane that stores and retrieves documents only within a project_id scope.
project.agentsecops.title: AgentSecOps
project.agentsecops.desc: An E2E Harness for testing security failure paths across Gateway, RAG, and Mock LLM.
project.aperture.title: Aperture-MCP
project.aperture.desc: A Rust Policy Proxy that checks and blocks MCP tools/call before execution.
project.lingo.title: LingoAgent
project.lingo.desc: This page was translated by LingoAgent. It follows a pipeline: ko.json change → LLM translation + ICU validation → GitHub Action auto-commit.
lingo.banner.title: Translated by LingoAgent
lingo.banner.desc: The UI text on this page was automatically generated from ko.json via the LingoAgent pipeline (ICU validation + LLM QA).
